value_accrual_summary: ORDI is a fixed-supply (21,000,000 cap) BRC-20 meme/inscription token deployed via the Bitcoin Ordinals protocol with no on-chain fee capture, no burn mechanism, no staking, and no governance-controlled treasury; value accrual is purely speculative and driven by secondary-market demand for the first BRC-20 token, not by any protocol cash-flow directed to holders.
